brief: Use clean B2B article HTML with readable sections, comparison tables, checklists, callout notes, and FAQ blocks. Keep the design neutral and practical.
htmlRules: Return full article HTML only, not Markdown.
Use semantic article, section, h1, h2, h3, p, ul, ol, table, details, summary, blockquote, and aside elements when useful.
Use class names prefixed with demo-article-.
